map.name: F_poly_shear_x2_padded
map.construction: Polynomial shear automorphism F(x,y,z)=(x, y+x^2, z) of R^3 (genuinely 2D nontrivial polynomial coupling padded by idle z). det DF=1 (Keller). Explicit polynomial inverse (x, y-x^2, z). Dual fields X0=dx-2x dy, X1=dy are complete: X0 flow x(t)=x0+t, y(t)=y0-2*x0*t-t^2 is polynomial in t (global for all real t). Pass-like polynomial baseline contrasting A009's open-set incompleteness and paralleling A008's smooth shear+sine pass, but here fully polynomial.

placeholders.star_domain_status: X0,X1 complete; ESS standard on R^3 expected

composition_notes: B001 v0.4 polynomial pass baseline for dichotomy scoreboard (complete dual fields; surjective Keller automorphism).
non_claims: Not a Jacobian counterexample (is an automorphism)
No dual-F unitary package (T4 N/A, pass-like)

evidence: polynomial inverse roundtrip; X0 flow polynomial complete
